title: The Quiet Road #1
author: Robert Frost
english: The road is quiet after rain. I fold the wind into a letter.
chinese: 雨后的小路安静下来。 我把风折进一封信里。

title: Night Harbor #2
author: Emily Dickinson
english: A small light stays in my pocket. Autumn writes slowly on the river.
chinese: 我把一盏小灯放进口袋。 秋天在河面上慢慢写字。

title: Winter Letter #3
author: William Blake
english: The harbor keeps the moon awake. At dawn, windows remember dreams.
chinese: 海港让月亮迟迟不眠。 黎明时，窗子记得梦。

title: A Small Star #4
author: W.B. Yeats
english: I fold the wind into a letter. My steps are softer than snowfall.
chinese: 我把风折进一封信里。 我的脚步比落雪更轻。

title: River in Autumn #5
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: Autumn writes slowly on the river. The distant bell names the evening.
chinese: 秋天在河面上慢慢写字。 远处的钟声为黄昏命名。

title: Window at Dawn #6
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: At dawn, windows remember dreams. The road is quiet after rain.
chinese: 黎明时，窗子记得梦。 雨后的小路安静下来。

chinese: 秋天在河面上慢慢写字。 远处的钟声为黄昏命名。

title: Night Harbor #110
author: Emily Dickinson
english: At dawn, windows remember dreams. The road is quiet after rain.
chinese: 黎明时，窗子记得梦。 雨后的小路安静下来。

title: Winter Letter #111
author: William Blake
english: My steps are softer than snowfall. A small light stays in my pocket.
chinese: 我的脚步比落雪更轻。 我把一盏小灯放进口袋。

title: A Small Star #112
author: W.B. Yeats
english: The distant bell names the evening. The harbor keeps the moon awake.
chinese: 远处的钟声为黄昏命名。 海港让月亮迟迟不眠。

title: River in Autumn #113
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: The road is quiet after rain. I fold the wind into a letter.
chinese: 雨后的小路安静下来。 我把风折进一封信里。

title: Window at Dawn #114
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: A small light stays in my pocket. Autumn writes slowly on the river.
chinese: 我把一盏小灯放进口袋。 秋天在河面上慢慢写字。

title: The Quiet Road #115
author: Robert Frost
english: The harbor keeps the moon awake. At dawn, windows remember dreams.
chinese: 海港让月亮迟迟不眠。 黎明时，窗子记得梦。

title: Night Harbor #116
author: Emily Dickinson
english: I fold the wind into a letter. My steps are softer than snowfall.
chinese: 我把风折进一封信里。 我的脚步比落雪更轻。
